name: ExportDeploymentResult
description: Result of an export deployment operation, including URLs to download the exported artifacts such as packages, plug-ins, customization files, and database scripts.

packageZip.description: URL to download the exported package ZIP file.

dataSource.description: The data source name or UUID associated with the export.

databaseScripts.description: Array of database script objects included in the export.

pluginsZip.description: URL to download the exported plug-ins ZIP file.

customizationFile.description: URL to download the export customization file.

customizationFileTemplate.description: URL to download a template customization file for the exported package.

deploymentLogUrl.description: URL to retrieve the full deployment log.
